summary: Full player journey traced: IntroCeltOS → Menu3DPC → MenuPrincipal → {ParchmentPreRun|SelectionSauvegarde} → BroceliandeForest3D → HubAntre → BroceliandeForest3D (loop). 8 checks: 2 CRITICAL (orphan scenes reachable via debug SceneSelector, MerlinGame dead-end), 2 HIGH (SCENE_TRANSITION dead const, GameFlowController unwired), 2 MEDIUM (MerlinCabinHub skipped, two hub architectures), 2 LOW (pixel_config/SceneSelector stale entries).

findings.description: IntroPersonalityQuiz.tscn + SceneRencontreMerlin.tscn are orphaned — no active scene routes to them. IntroPersonalityQuiz.gd:12 routes to SceneRencontreMerlin but nothing routes to IntroPersonalityQuiz from the active flow (IntroCeltOS → Menu3DPC skips them). Director confirmed deletion (q-20260414-005).

BroceliandeForest3D.GAME_SCENE = 'res://scenes/MerlinGame.tscn'. _on_hub() when _merlin_found=true routes to MerlinGame.tscn — the OLD card game architecture. MerlinGame.tscn has no return path to HubAntre. Creates a dead-end mid-session. Task E2E-MERLINGAME-OBSOLETE-PATH exists at P12 — needs priority upgrade to P5.

HubAntre.gd defines SCENE_TRANSITION := 'res://scenes/TransitionBiome.tscn' (line 16) but _launch_adventure() at line 661 calls PixelTransition.transition_to(SCENE_FOREST) directly — SCENE_TRANSITION constant is NEVER used. This means the TransitionBiome.tscn biome-entry cinematic is fully bypassed. Intent was HubAntre → TransitionBiome → BroceliandeForest3D.

GameFlowController (HubScreen→Run3D→EndRunScreen) is a class — NOT registered as autoload and NOT instantiated from any active scene script. The active path is HubAntre→BroceliandeForest3D direct. Two parallel hub architectures coexist with no bridge. Task E2E-DEAD-PATH-GAME-FLOW-CONTROLLER at P4 addresses migration.

Comment at line 279 states 'Book cinematic is now shown in MerlinCabinHub BEFORE entering forest' but _launch_adventure() in HubAntre skips MerlinCabinHub.tscn entirely — flow goes HubAntre → BroceliandeForest3D directly. MerlinCabinHub.tscn exists and has a script (merlin_cabin_hub.gd) but is never reached. Either wire it or remove stale comment.

SceneSelector.gd lists 'MerlinGame' → 'res://scenes/MerlinGame.tscn' (line 17). Once E2E-MERLINGAME-OBSOLETE-PATH is resolved and MerlinGame.tscn is deprecated, this entry becomes misleading. Also pixel_transition_config.gd:71 maps MerlinGame.tscn with a config entry.

GameManager autoload contains methods from old architecture: generate_map(), add_gold(), spend_gold(), get_type_multiplier(), save_to_slot(). None of these are called from active flow scripts (HubAntre, BroceliandeForest3D, ParchmentPreRun). GameManager may be a legacy autoload with dead code bloating startup.

IntroCeltOS → Menu3DPC → MenuPrincipal → ParchmentPreRun → BroceliandeForest3D → HubAntre: all .tscn files EXIST and transitions are wired via PixelTransition. HubAntre side branches (Calendar, Collection, ArbreDeVie, MapMonde, MenuOptions, Menu3DPC) all reference existing .tscn files. SelectionSauvegarde → HubAntre.tscn is correct.

scene_existence_check.TransitionBiome.tscn: EXISTS (BYPASSED — never called from HubAntre active path)
scene_existence_check.MerlinGame.tscn: EXISTS (ORPHAN — routed from dead BroceliandeForest3D._on_hub path)
